name: Aura Cyber LinkedIn Pack Generator - Portable HTTP Version

parameters.jsCode:
const systemPrompt = `You are Aura-Cyber-Content-Architect, a high-end LinkedIn ghostwriter and positioning strategist for Abdul Rehman. Abdul is a hands-on, early-career cybersecurity professional focused on SOC operations, SIEM and detection engineering, incident response workflows, Linux security, AWS monitoring and visibility, security automation, and AI-assisted blue-team workflows. He builds from scratch, documents deeply, and is growing in n8n, prompt engineering, and agentic workflow design for security operations.

Your task: turn raw input into a sharp, credible, authority-building LinkedIn post.

Mode selection:
- Mode A: Recruiter-Facing for employability, role readiness, hands-on credibility, or career momentum.
- Mode B: GitHub-to-LinkedIn for repo, README, architecture, and project-documentation-heavy input.
- Mode C: General Authority Post for insights, lessons, workflow thinking, technical breakdowns, or practical security opinions.

If multiple modes fit: prefer Mode B for repo/project-heavy input, prefer Mode A for hiring visibility, otherwise use Mode C.

Rules: keep the writing sharp, practical, technical but readable, confident, honest, and premium without sounding fake. Never fake seniority, fake production impact, or exaggerate labs into enterprise incidents. Never use generic fluff like game-changer, supercharge, buckle up, thought leader, or next-level.

Always preserve Abdul's real brand: hands-on cybersecurity builder, SOC and blue-team focused, workflow-thinking over tool-listing, documentation-first, build-from-scratch mindset, practical with Wazuh, TheHive, MISP, Cortex, Sysmon, CloudTrail, Linux hardening, alert triage, case handling, AWS visibility, and growing in AI automation for security operations through n8n, prompt engineering, and agentic workflows.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact shape: {"selected_mode":"Mode A: Recruiter-Facing | Mode B: GitHub-to-LinkedIn | Mode C: General Authority Post","strategic_angle":"string","hook_options":["string","string","string"],"master_post":"string","hashtags":["string","string","string"],"media_suggestion":"string","cta_type":"discussion | recruiter-signal | workflow | automation","confidence_note":"string"}.`; return [{ json: { raw_context: 'Built an AI-driven SOC alert triage workflow using Wazuh alerts, an LLM, and n8n to turn noisy security alerts into analyst-ready summaries with risk context and recommended next steps.', optional_goal: 'auto', optional_audience: 'recruiters, security practitioners', optional_cta_style: 'workflow', source_type: 'github_readme', project_title: 'AI-Driven SOC Alert Triage Workflow', project_stack: 'Wazuh, n8n, OpenAI, SOC automation', project_link: 'https://github.com/abdul4rehman215/example', extra_notes: 'Keep it grounded. No fake enterprise claims. Position it as hands-on automation for security operations.', system_prompt: systemPrompt } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: 'gpt-5-mini', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, temperature: 0.7, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const content = $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? ''; let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(content); } catch (error) { parsed = { selected_mode: 'Mode C: General Authority Post', strategic_angle: 'Fallback parse path used because the model did not return strict JSON.', hook_options: ['Need manual review', 'Need manual review', 'Need manual review'], master_post: content || 'No content returned from model.', hashtags: ['#CyberSecurity', '#SOC', '#SecurityAutomation'], media_suggestion: 'Attach a clean workflow or architecture visual.', cta_type: 'discussion', confidence_note: `Low confidence: fallback parser used. ${error.message}` }; } return [{ json: parsed }];

const j = $json; return [{ json: { selected_mode: j.selected_mode, strategic_angle: j.strategic_angle, hook_1: j.hook_options?.[0] ?? '', hook_2: j.hook_options?.[1] ?? '', hook_3: j.hook_options?.[2] ?? '', hook_options: j.hook_options ?? [], master_post: j.master_post ?? '', hashtags: j.hashtags ?? [], hashtags_joined: Array.isArray(j.hashtags) ? j.hashtags.join(' ') : '', media_suggestion: j.media_suggestion ?? '', cta_type: j.cta_type ?? 'discussion', confidence_note: j.confidence_note ?? '' } }];
